---
title: "Work Experience"
editor_options: 
  chunk_output_type: console
---

```{r load_libraries, include=FALSE}
source("./site_libs/script.R")
load_libraries()
file <- "work"
```

```{r eval=FALSE}
render_web()
```

```{r main}
nav()
print_work()
print_newline()
print_h2("Brigham Young University - Idaho")
print_newline()
print_h4("Part-Time")
print_newline()
print_h3("Teaching Assistant {.tabset .tabset-fade}")
print_ta()
print_newline()
print_tutor()
footer(file)
```
